query:
SELECT
                 COALESCE(
                   SUM(
                     EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
                       COALESCE(disconnected_at, now()) - connected_at
                     ))
                   ), 0
                 )::float8 AS connected_seconds
               FROM worker_sessions
               WHERE peer_id = $1
                 AND connected_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
